assertion_results.text: Data extraction identifies the ecosystem as RPM based on the library name (openssl-libs) and component context, not Cargo (Step 1 Ecosystem detection — read ecosystems from Ecosystem Mappings config)
assertion_results.evidence: data-extraction.md lines 30-32: 'Library: `openssl-libs` -- this is a system-level RPM package, not a source dependency' and 'Ecosystem: **RPM**'. The ecosystem is identified as RPM based on the library name being a system-level RPM package. No mention of Cargo.

assertion_results.text: Version impact table includes ALL versions from the 2.2.x stream supportability matrix (2.2.0 through 2.2.4) and uses rpms.lock.yaml data for version extraction (Step 2.3)
assertion_results.evidence: version-impact.md lines 7-13: Table includes all five versions — 2.2.0 (openssl-libs 3.0.7-25.el9_3), 2.2.1 (3.0.7-27.el9_4), 2.2.2 (3.0.7-27.el9_4), 2.2.3 (3.0.7-28.el9_4), and 2.2.4 (3.0.7-28.el9_4). The openssl-libs column values are extracted from rpms.lock.yaml data at each version's pinned tag.

assertion_results.text: Dependency chain context classifies the package origin as explicit install because openssl-libs is present in rpms.lock.yaml, not inherited from the base image (Step 2.3.5)
assertion_results.evidence: version-impact.md lines 28-32 (Dependency Chain section): 'rpms.lock.yaml: **present** -- explicit install' and 'Origin: **explicit install** (openssl-libs is specified in rpms.lock.yaml)'. Explicitly distinguishes from base image inheritance.

assertion_results.text: Remediation creates a single task for the Konflux release repo — not the two-task upstream backport + downstream propagation flow used for source dependency ecosystems (Step 7 Remediation Task Creation — system package path)
assertion_results.evidence: remediation.md line 6: 'Ecosystem is RPM (system package) so a single remediation task is created.' Only one task description is present with Repository 'rhtpa-release.0.4.z' (the Konflux release repo). No upstream backport task or downstream propagation subtask exists in the output.

assertion_results.text: Remediation task description follows task-description-template.md format with Repository, Target Branch, Description, Implementation Notes, and Acceptance Criteria sections — Files to Modify is intentionally omitted per remediation-templates.md (Step 7 Remediation Task Creation)
assertion_results.evidence: remediation.md contains all required sections: '## Repository' (line 10, value 'rhtpa-release.0.4.z'), '## Target Branch' (line 14, value 'main'), '## Description' (line 18), '## Implementation Notes' (line 31), '## Acceptance Criteria' (line 38). Also includes optional sections '## Test Requirements' (line 43) and '## Dependencies' (line 47). No '## Files to Modify' section is present, consistent with remediation-templates.md lines 186-188 which state 'Files to Modify and Files to Create are intentionally omitted.'
